title: datamodel × workflow overview generator + interactive docs page
description:
## Summary
- Adds a Python generator (`scripts/datamodel/`) that introspects `shared-db` via kubectl-exec and combines live schema data with a hand-curated `workflow-map.yaml` to produce an interactive Markdown documentation page
- Generates `k3d/docs-content/datamodel-workflow.md` with hero lifecycle SVG (28 steps across 4 families), Step×Domain matrix with drill-down, skill cards, Mermaid ER diagrams for all 8 domains, heuristic gap findings, and a coverage footer — all with inline CSS/JS
- Extracts the `DOMAINS` dict from `scripts/db-schema-diagram.py` into a shared `scripts/datamodel/domains.py` to eliminate duplication; adds `task datamodel:build` and sidebar entry under "Referenz"

## Test plan
- [x] 29 unit tests pass: `python3 -m unittest discover -s scripts/datamodel/tests -v`
- [x] `task datamodel:build ENV=mentolder` produces 101 tables, 28 steps, 97 FKs
- [x] Sanity-grep: `data-step`, `class="hero-svg"`, 8 Mermaid blocks all present
- [x] `task docs:build FAST=true` builds 46 pages; HTML preserves `data-step` and `<script>` tag
- [x] `scripts/db-schema-diagram.py` still reports 8 domains after DOMAINS refactor

Closes T000367

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
